get.summary: Liveness probe
get.description: Returns 200 instantly if the process is running. Use for uptime monitors / load balancer pings.

get.summary: Readiness probe
get.description: Returns 200 only if both database and Redis are reachable. Use for k8s readiness or pre-deploy checks.

200.description: App is ready to serve traffic.

503.description: App is NOT ready — one or more critical services are down.

get.summary: Full health check
get.description: Returns detailed status of database, Redis, queues, memory, and environment. Always HTTP 200 — inspect the `status` field.

200.description: `status` will be `ok` if everything is healthy, or `degraded` with details on what is failing.

get.summary: List all audit log entries (SUPER_ADMIN only)
get.description:
Returns a paginated, sortable, filterable list of all audit log entries on the platform.

        **Filters available:**
        - `actorId` — UUID of the user who triggered the action. Pass `null` (string) to see only system-generated entries.
        - `action` — Exact action name, e.g. `provision_va`, `send_otp`, `reconcile_deposit_success`.
        - `entityType` — Exact entity type, e.g. `User`, `Wallet`, `Transaction`, `Group`, `Invitation`.
        - `entityId` — UUID of the specific entity affected.
        - `search` — Case-insensitive substring match on the `action` field.
        - `from` / `to` — ISO-8601 date range filter on `createdAt`.

        **Sorting:**
        - `sortBy`: `createdAt` (default) | `action` | `entityType` | `actorId`
        - `sortOrder`: `desc` (default) | `asc`

parameters.name: actorId
parameters.description: Filter by acting user UUID. Pass "null" to get system-generated entries (actorId IS NULL).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by action name (exact match). E.g. send_otp, provision_va, reconcile_deposit_success.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Filter by entity type (exact match). E.g. User, Wallet, Transaction, Group, Invitation.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across the action field (case-insensitive contains).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Return logs created on or after this ISO-8601 datetime.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return logs created on or before this ISO-8601 datetime.

post.summary: Rotate refresh token and obtain new access token

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the user's email. OTP expires after 10 minutes.
Validates the OTP and sets the new password. All existing sessions are revoked.
Sends a 6-digit OTP to the authenticated user's email. OTP expires after 10 minutes.
Confirms the user's email address using the 6-digit OTP.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's own profile
List users (paginated)
get.description: Group admins can list all users except super admins. Super admins can list all users including other super admins.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search users by name, email, or phone number

parameters.name: includeUnverified
parameters.description: When true, includes unverified users. Defaults to false (verified users only).

post.summary: Complete onboarding for invited user (set password/profile)
Upgrade a PROXY user to full USER
post.description: Changes role from PROXY to USER and sets notification channel to EMAIL.

get.summary: List fraud flags (admin)
Get wallet balance for a user
Get transaction history for a user's wallet
List non-provisioned wallets (admin)

post.description: Instantly marks every un-provisioned wallet as PROVISIONED with dummy Paystack data. Only works when NODE_ENV !== production.

get.summary: Search groups
Get group details

patch.description: Name, description, and terms can be updated anytime. Core fields (contributionAmount, frequency, maxSlots, serviceCharge, lateFee) can only be updated before the group starts.

delete.description: Deletes a NOT_STARTED group and all contributors. Hard delete — no audit trail needed.

get.summary: Get current user's contributor slots in a group
get.description: Returns the calling user's contributor records in the group, whether terms acceptance is required, and whether they have accepted.

get.summary: Get random joinable groups for discovery (top 5)
Get group feed (audit log) for a group
get.description: Only accessible to group members and the group admin.

post.description: Prevents all mutations on the group until unfrozen.
Transfers remaining group wallet balance (late fees, etc.) to admin wallet and archives the group.

get.summary: List all contributors in a group
get.description: Returns members with their user details, displayId and payout order. Supports pagination, sorting (joinedAt, payoutOrder) and search by displayId, name or email.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by displayId (contributor code), first name, last name or email

post.summary: Add yourself as a contributor in a group
post.description: Adds the authenticated user as a contributor (up to 2 slots). Group admins use this to join their own group. Existing contributors use it to claim a second slot. Group must be NOT_STARTED and have free slots.

patch.summary: Swap payout order between two contributors

post.summary: Accept group terms for a contributor slot
post.description: Contributors must accept the group terms before the group can start. Admin slots are auto-accepted.
Admin-only. Sends a notification to every contributor who has not yet accepted the group terms.

patch.summary: Approve or reject a join request

post.summary: Invite a user to the group

get.summary: List pending invites for group

post.summary: Invite a non-app user by contact info (sends OTP)
Create a join link for group

get.summary: Get active join link for group

patch.summary: Update join link status (pause or resume)

get.summary: Get QR code for group join link

post.summary: Step 1 – Admin initiates proxy registration: sends OTP via SMS to the user
post.description: An OTP is sent to the provided phone number. The (non-tech-savvy) user reads the OTP back to the admin verbally, confirming consent before the admin proceeds to confirm.

post.summary: Step 2 – Admin confirms OTP read back by user, completing proxy registration
post.description: Validates the OTP, creates the user account (role: PROXY, notificationChannel: SMS), provisions a wallet, adds the user to the group, and sends a temporary password via SMS.

200.description: Proxy user created and added to group

example.message: Proxy user registered and added to group

get.summary: List my received invitations

post.summary: Complete onboarding for an invited user (no auth)
Join a group using a join link token

get.summary: List notifications for authenticated user

post.description: Cycles are normally created automatically when a group starts. This endpoint allows a SUPER_ADMIN to create cycles manually.

get.summary: Get the current contribution cycle for a group
Get contribution status for a group
List defaulters for a cycle

post.description: Payments are normally processed automatically via auto-debit. This endpoint allows a SUPER_ADMIN to record payments manually.

patch.description: Mark a cycle as complete. Normally handled automatically by the system.

patch.summary: Admin override: mark a FAILED payment as PAID
patch.description: Used when a defaulter has been covered by the admin or paid outside the system. Marks the payment PAID and triggers cycle completion check.

post.summary: Re-enqueue retry job for failed payments in a cycle
post.description: Admin triggers another auto-debit attempt for all FAILED payments in a cycle.

patch.summary: Waive a late fee charged on a payment
patch.description: Reverses the late fee double-entry transaction, refunding the user.

post.summary: Re-enqueue a payout job for a cycle (async via worker)
post.description: Use when a payout job failed after all automatic retries. Enqueues a new payout job for the given cycle.
Enqueues a one-off Paystack reconciliation job for the reconciliation worker.

post.summary: Provider charge webhook (create or update internal tx)
Paystack native webhook handler (virtual-account deposits, generic events)
Create a payment intent to begin checkout

get.summary: List disputes (filter by userId query param)

patch.summary: Resolve or update a dispute (SUPER_ADMIN only)
patch.description: Transition dispute to INVESTIGATING, RESOLVED, or REJECTED.

post.summary: Get or create conversation between user and group admin

get.summary: Get all conversations for a group (admin only)

post.summary: Send a message in a conversation

get.summary: Get messages in a conversation

post.summary: Create a ticket (contributor replacement or leave group)

get.summary: Get ticket details
Get my tickets
Get all tickets for a group (admin only)

info.title: Hajor API
info.description: API documentation for Hajor fintech system

phone.description: Nigerian phone number in international format

dob.description: Date of birth (must be at least 16 years old)

utilityBillUrl.description: URL of uploaded utility bill document

notificationChannel.description: Notification delivery channel: EMAIL, SMS, or BOTH

walletProvisioned.description: Whether the user wallet has been provisioned with a virtual account

description.example: A short description of the group

adminIndemnityAccepted.description: Admin must accept the indemnity agreement to create a group

adminIndemnityText.description: The full text of the indemnity the admin agreed to
adminIndemnityText.example: I accept full responsibility for managing this group...

terms.description: Group-specific terms and conditions that contributors must accept before participating
terms.example: All members must contribute on time. Late payments incur a fee...

termsAcceptedAt.description: When terms were accepted, or null if pending

isMember.description: Whether the calling user is a member of this group

termsRequired.description: Whether this group has terms that must be accepted

contributors.description: The user's contributor slot(s) in this group

termsAcceptedAt.description: When the contributor accepted the group terms. Null if not yet accepted.

slots.description: Maximum contributor slots for the group

firstName.description: First name of the person being registered

lastName.description: Last name of the person being registered

phone.description: Phone number (OTP will be sent here)

email.description: Email address. If omitted a placeholder is auto-generated (proxy.PHONE@internal.hajor.app).

phone.description: The phone number used in the init step

otp.description: 6-digit OTP received by the user via SMS

adminNotes.example: Verified payment was received late due to bank delay

content.example: Hello, I would like to join this group

contributorId.description: For CONTRIBUTOR_REPLACEMENT: the contributorId to replace

newUserId.description: For CONTRIBUTOR_REPLACEMENT: the new user to add
